CustomField.description: The org's delivery-team capacity pool fed to the gantt (NG options.team): entries separated by ';', each formatted 'Name|Role|HoursPerMonth' (e.g. 'Glen|Principal Engineer|80;Mahi|SFDC Dev|50'). Drives the Pace dial's capacity ceiling and the Team Capacity modal. Blank = NG's built-in vendor fallback (named Cloud Nimbus staff, 170h/mo) — every subscriber org should set its own. Custom settings only support primitives, hence the delimited text format; per-assignee calendars are the NG GAP-2 v2 follow-on.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Semicolon-separated team members: Name|Role|HoursPerMonth. Example: Glen|Principal Engineer|80;Mahi|SFDC Dev|50
CustomField.label: Team Capacity Pool
